name: @aqua/plugin-client-files
description: Aqua portal per-client file vault. Inline base64 storage for blobs <2MB; larger files store as `external` references with a runbook hook for T6 to wire S3. Per-actor visibility (visibleToClient flag) — client-shell users see only their share, agency sees all. 5 categories: brand-assets · brief-strategy · deliverables · invoices · misc.
